messages.subject: Spring Break Wrap-Up & BEST Writing Prep
messages.summary: Welcome back from Spring Break! This week we begin the 4th grading period. Please help Bronson prepare for the BEST Writing Assessment on Tuesday, March 31. It is a 120-minute computer-based state test. Students should get a good night's sleep, eat a healthy breakfast, and avoid electronics the night before. No new newsletters were sent over break — expect a fresh one this Sunday.

messages.subject: Welcome Back & Week Ahead
messages.summary: Welcome back from Spring Break! We're starting the 4th grading period this week. No new newsletters were sent during the break — look for a fresh update this coming Sunday. This week we'll be reviewing reading comprehension and starting a new math unit on measurement.
